intro: Navigate challenging mazes, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden illustrations. Can you collect all the "Time Stones" and make it back to the present day?
description:
Journey Through Time: A Maze Adventure!

Embark on an incredible adventure, starting in the age of dinosaurs, moving through the Jomon and Yayoi periods, and finally arriving in Edo Japan!

Navigate challenging mazes, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden illustrations. Can you collect all the "Time Stones" and make it back to the present day?



Conquer Tricky Mazes!

Strategize your way through intricate mazes, collecting Time Stones scattered throughout each historical era. These aren't just any mazes; they're designed with unique conditions for reaching the goal, testing your critical thinking and spatial reasoning skills!



Solve Quizzes and Find Hidden Pictures!

Dive into detailed illustrations from each period to solve quizzes and discover hidden pictures. Even adults will get hooked on the challenge, making it fun for the whole family! Each era also features playful hidden elements that will make you wonder, "Why is this here in this time period?" As you play, you'll sharpen your observation skills and learn fascinating facts about each historical era.



Exciting Updates Ahead!



Get ready for more thrilling new content coming soon!
